project.name: relay-crm
project.purpose: A B2B SaaS platform for managing customer relationships and sales pipelines, serving mid-size companies. Speed of iteration and data integrity are prioritized over feature breadth.

module_map.purpose: Next.js web application — all UI, pages, and client-side state.
FastAPI backend — REST endpoints, business logic, and database access.
Shared TypeScript types, constants, and utilities used by both frontend and backend.
Terraform configs, Docker setup, and CI/CD pipelines. Human-managed only.

key_libraries.name: tanstack-query
key_libraries.purpose: Server state, caching, and data fetching.

key_libraries.name: zod
key_libraries.purpose: Runtime schema validation for API boundaries.

key_libraries.name: pydantic
key_libraries.purpose: Data validation and settings management in Python services.

principles.name: data_integrity_first
principles.statement: Customer data is sacred. Never ship a change that risks data loss, corruption, or unauthorized access. When in doubt, add a validation layer.

principles.name: ship_small
principles.statement: Prefer small, scoped changes over large rewrites. Every PR should be reviewable in under 15 minutes. If a task is growing beyond its scope, split it.

principles.name: simplicity_over_cleverness
principles.statement: Write code that a new team member could understand in one read. Avoid premature abstraction, clever patterns, and unnecessary indirection.

principles.name: test_the_boundaries
principles.statement: Focus testing effort on API boundaries, data transformations, and user-facing flows. Don't test implementation details.

principles.name: accessible_by_default
principles.statement: All UI components must meet WCAG 2.1 AA. Accessibility is a requirement, not a nice-to-have.
